home.title: Welcome — Buguya nuani.
home.subtitle: A community-owned Garifuna learning platform built with the Garifuna Commission on Education and the Ibagari Foundation.
home.cta_onboarding: I'm new — show me where to begin

onboarding.title: Welcome — let's find where you are
onboarding.subtitle: A few questions help us shape your path. There are no wrong answers.
onboarding.step1_title: Who in your life speaks Garifuna?

step1_options.family_fluent: A family member speaks it fluently
step1_options.family_some: A family member speaks some, mostly with elders
step1_options.community: People in my community speak it
step1_options.none_yet: I'm learning fresh — no Garifuna around me yet

onboarding.step2_title: How comfortable are you with Garifuna right now?
onboarding.step2_subtitle: Be honest — listening and speaking are different. Choose what fits.

step2_options.none: I don't know any Garifuna yet
step2_options.receptive: I understand some when others speak; I don't speak it much
step2_options.conversational: I can have a basic conversation
step2_options.fluent: I speak Garifuna comfortably; I want to read + write better

onboarding.step3_subtitle: Each Garifuna community has its own variations — we'll honor yours.
onboarding.step4_heritage_intro: You're on the Heritage path — we'll start with what your family already gave you.
onboarding.step4_novice_intro: You're on the Novice path — step by step, we'll build this together.
onboarding.step4_l1_intro: You're on the L1-maintainer path — strong oral foundation; we'll deepen literacy + register.

lexicon.title: Lexicon + Learning Charts
lexicon.subtitle: Browse the canonical Garifuna lexicon + 40 trilingual learning charts across 29 subjects.
lexicon.elder_gated_note: Some content (dance, music, ceremony) requires community elder authority — those charts surface a referral, not specifics.

badges.title: My Badges
badges.subtitle: Verifiable digital credentials per Open Badges 3.0.
badges.empty: No badges yet — complete a lesson or mastery milestone to earn your first.

tutor.title: Socratic Tutor
tutor.subtitle: A grounded AI tutor that scaffolds, not lectures.
tutor.session_complete: Session complete — return when you're ready.

a11y_panel.title: Accessibility preferences
a11y_panel.subtitle: These settings save to your device. Per WCAG 2.2 AAA + W3C Making Content Usable (COGA).
a11y_panel.plain_language_desc: Adds simpler-language summaries next to every lesson step.

cultural_protocol.title: Labayayahoun Ibagari — the Foundation's Guardianship
cultural_protocol.principle: The Garifuna language is held under Labayayahoun Ibagari — the Foundation's guardianship. Data is not owned but cared for. Any benefit derived flows back to the Garifuna people, through the Garifuna Commission on Education and the Ibagari Foundation. Use is gifted with agüriahati — the kinship-act of nurturing the language into the next generation.
